docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-20-2012 CONTINUED TO JUN-01-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF JACQUELINE N. ANKER RE: REQUEST TO EXCUSE PHYSICAL APPEARANCE AT CASE MANAGEMENT AND ACCEPT THIS DECLARATION IN LIEU FILED BY PLAINTIFF H.K. MALLAK INC., A CORPORATION

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-17-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-01-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF H.K. MALLAK INC., A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT HATTON TRADING & SONS, INC., A CORPORATION CHATRATH, ROMESH AN INDIVIDUAL DBA HATTON TRADING & SONS CHATRATH, RAVIN AN INDIVIDUAL DBA HATTON TRADING & SONS DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-17-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-02-2012 CONTINUED TO APR-20-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
